title: PlayRewardZ
description: Reward players for being active on your server
body:
# PlayRewardZ - Playtime Rewards System

PlayRewardZ is a comprehensive Minecraft plugin that transforms player dedication into tangible rewards. By tracking playtime with precision and delivering configurable milestone rewards, this plugin adds a new dimension of progression to your server.

## ⏰ Core Features

### Accurate Playtime Tracking
- Detailed playtime statistics tracking down to the second
- Persistent cross-session playtime data
- Optional AFK detection integration to count only active playtime

### Milestone Reward System
- Create unlimited playtime milestones (1 hour, 5 hours, 100 hours, etc.)
- Fully customizable rewards for each milestone
- Dynamic milestone discovery for players

### Player-Friendly Commands
- Simple `/playtime` command to check personal stats
- Intuitive milestone claim interface
- Progress tracking toward next milestone

### Admin Controls
- Complete milestone management via in-game commands
- Detailed permission system for granular access control
- Ability to check any player's playtime data

## 🛠️ Highly Configurable

Every aspect of the system can be tailored to your server's needs:

- **Customizable Messages**: Edit all player-facing text and announcements
- **Sound Effects**: Configure sounds for milestone achievements
- **Save Frequency**: Adjust how often player data is saved
- **AFK Handling**: Option to exclude idle time from playtime calculations

## 🧩 Server Integration

PlayRewardZ is designed to integrate seamlessly with your existing server infrastructure:

- Lightweight implementation with minimal performance impact
- Compatible with all major Minecraft versions 1.20+
- Works alongside economy, permission, and other gameplay plugins
- Expandable with future planned integrations

## 💎 Why Choose PlayRewardZ?

This plugin creates a powerful progression system that rewards player loyalty and engagement. By acknowledging the time players invest in your server, you create stronger community bonds and encourage regular participation.

Unlike simple economy plugins, PlayRewardZ focuses on meaningful milestone achievements that mark significant player investment. The treasure chest of rewards becomes more valuable as players dedicate more time to your community.

Perfect for survival, RPG, and community-focused servers looking to enhance player retention through meaningful progression systems.

## ⚙️ Technical Details

- Efficient YAML data storage system
- Developer-friendly API for integration with custom plugins
- Regular updates and responsive support
- Clean, well-documented code structure

---

Add PlayRewardZ to your server today and transform player dedication into a rewarding progression journey that keeps your community engaged and coming back for more!
